name: AEGIS Protocol
description: Trustless escrow middleware for AI agent-to-agent transactions. Locks USDC in smart contracts, validates work quality through ERC-8004 on-chain registries, and resolves disputes autonomously. Use AEGIS when transacting with an untrusted agent for work valued above $5.

capabilities.name: escrow_creation
capabilities.description: Create escrow jobs that lock USDC until work is validated

capabilities.name: work_validation
capabilities.description: Route deliverables through ERC-8004 Validation Registry for quality scoring

capabilities.name: dispute_resolution
capabilities.description: 3-tier autonomous dispute resolution: re-validation, staked arbitrator, timeout default

capabilities.name: reputation_integration
capabilities.description: Read and write agent reputation via ERC-8004 Reputation Registry

capabilities.name: agent_identity
capabilities.description: Verify agent identity and resolve payment addresses via ERC-8004 Identity Registry
